dashboard.welcomeDescription: Mentor suggestions and sessions that need your attention.
dashboard.notif.checkinBodyAdmin: Your team admin just opened this week's reflection. Two short questions about your week.
dashboard.notif.checkinBody: It's time for your weekly check-in. Two short questions, helps refine your matches.
dashboard.notif.enabledBody: You'll see a toast when your weekly check-in is ready.
dashboard.checkin.alertTitleAdmin: New weekly check-in from your admin
dashboard.checkin.alertBodyAdmin: Two short questions about your week. Helps refine your matches and surface skills you can mentor on.
dashboard.checkin.alertBodyFirst: Two short questions. Your answers feed your skill landscape over time.
dashboard.checkin.alertBodyDays: It's been {days} days. Two short questions, that's it.
dashboard.checkin.panelSubtitle: Two short answers help keep your mentoring matches current.
dashboard.notifInlineSuffix: for OS-level toasts when your weekly check-in is ready.
dashboard.mentors.title: Mentors for you
dashboard.mentors.descLoading: Looking for colleagues who could help you grow…
dashboard.mentors.descEmpty: No mentor suggestions yet — complete your skills so we can match you.
dashboard.mentors.descOne: One colleague who could mentor you on what you're trying to grow.
dashboard.mentors.descMany: {count} colleagues who could mentor you on what you're trying to grow.
dashboard.mentors.emptyBody: Complete your profile skills so we can find mentors for you.
dashboard.sessions.title: Your sessions
dashboard.sessions.empty: No active sessions yet. Request one from your mentor suggestions above.
dashboard.goal.hit: Goal hit — {completed}/{goal} sessions this month. Nice rhythm.
dashboard.goal.one: You're one session away from your monthly goal of {goal}.
dashboard.goal.half: {completed}/{goal} sessions done this month — over halfway there.
dashboard.goal.default: {completed}/{goal} sessions this month. Keep the conversations going.
